## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill / hook / agent / command
- [ ] Doc update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Breaking change (explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Ran `./install.sh /tmp/test-project --profile standard` and it succeeded
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on any modified shell scripts
- [ ] `jq empty` passes on any modified JSON files
- [ ] If adding a hook: registered in `.claude/profiles/<profile>.json` and documented in `docs/HOOKS.md`
- [ ] If adding a skill: added to `.claude/skills/skill-table.md`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
